title: WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: UNITED COMMUNITY ACTION NETWORK JOSEPHINE COUNTY SERVICE CENTER WEATHERIZATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides weatherization services that focus on helping families lower their energy use and utility costs, improve indoor air quality, and provide a healthier, more comfortable home. Service may include insulating attics, walls, heating ducts, and floors; sealing air leaks; improving attic and under-floor air flow; installing carbon monoxide and smoke alarms; and providing air purifiers and air filters. May also include servicing heating equipment and performing minor health and safety repairs. 900 SE 8th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-3pm (541) 956-4064 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 956-4064 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to be placed on the weatherization list. If assistance is available, an appointment for an application is scheduled. Once the application is completed, an energy audit is scheduled to determine which measures would benefit your home. The weatherization work is then completed and an inspection determines if the work meets state standards. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Social Security cards for all household members, Photo ID, utility bill, proof of homeownership (if applicable), and proof of income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Weatherization Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY SYSTEM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED COMMUNITY ACTION NETWORK JOSEPHINE COUNTY SERVICE CENTER
